query:
INSERT INTO clubs (id, name, slug, tagline, description, location, country, category, avatar_url, banner_url, accent_color, owner_id, owner_name, member_count, tournament_count, follower_count, is_public, website, twitter, discord, announcement, founded_at)
VALUES
('seed-club-1', 'London Chess Club', 'london-chess-club', 'The oldest chess club in the world, still playing strong.', 'Founded in 1807, London Chess Club is one of the world''s oldest and most prestigious chess clubs.', 'London, UK', 'GB', 'club', NULL, NULL, '#1a3a5c', 'seed', 'James Whitmore', 142, 24, 0, 1, 'https://londonchessclub.org', NULL, NULL, 'Spring Open 2026 registrations now open — 64 player cap, Swiss 7 rounds.', '2024-01-15 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-2', 'NYC Chess Collective', 'nyc-chess-collective', 'Bringing chess to every corner of New York City.', 'A community-driven club running weekly blitz nights in Brooklyn, Manhattan, and Queens.', 'New York, NY', 'US', 'community', NULL, NULL, '#8B1A1A', 'seed', 'Maria Santos', 89, 18, 0, 1, NULL, NULL, 'https://discord.gg/nycchess', NULL, '2024-06-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-3', 'Stanford Chess Team', 'stanford-chess-team', 'Competing at the collegiate level since 1972.', 'Stanford''s official intercollegiate chess team.', 'Stanford, CA', 'US', 'university', NULL, NULL, '#8C1515', 'seed', 'Alex Chen', 34, 9, 0, 1, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '2024-09-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-4', 'Berlin Schachclub', 'berlin-schachclub', 'Schach für alle — Chess for everyone.', 'Berlin''s most active chess club with over 200 members.', 'Berlin, Germany', 'DE', 'club', NULL, NULL, '#2D4A22', 'seed', 'Klaus Müller', 218, 31, 0, 1, 'https://berlinschachclub.de', NULL, NULL, NULL, '2023-11-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-5', 'Tokyo Chess Society', 'tokyo-chess-society', 'Where East meets West over 64 squares.', 'An international chess community in Tokyo welcoming players from Japan and around the world.', 'Tokyo, Japan', 'JP', 'club', NULL, NULL, '#8B2252', 'seed', 'Yuki Tanaka', 67, 12, 0, 1, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '2024-02-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-6', 'Mumbai Chess Academy', 'mumbai-chess-academy', 'Training India''s next generation of grandmasters.', 'A professional chess academy offering structured training programs for all ages.', 'Mumbai, India', 'IN', 'professional', NULL, NULL, '#5C3317', 'seed', 'Priya Sharma', 156, 22, 0, 1, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '2023-08-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-7', 'Pawn Chess Club', 'pawn-chess-club', 'NYC''s most vibrant chess nightlife — all levels welcome.', 'Born in New York City with a simple goal: create a space where strangers and friends could play chess without intimidation.', 'New York, NY', 'US', 'community', NULL, NULL, '#E8C547', 'seed', 'Ismu Isamu', 312, 38, 0, 1, 'https://www.instagram.com/pawnchessclub/', NULL, NULL, '🎉 Speed Dating Chess Night — every Friday 7–9pm. All levels welcome. Limited tickets.', '2022-09-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-8', 'Club Chess NYC', 'club-chess-nyc', 'Where chess meets nightlife — est. 2023.', 'Club Chess is a New York City-based chess collective founded in 2023.', 'New York, NY', 'US', 'club', NULL, NULL, '#9B59B6', 'seed', 'Luke Quietman', 274, 29, 0, 1, 'https://www.instagram.com/clubchess.club/', NULL, NULL, '♟️ Next event: Chess Night at The Monroe — live DJ, all levels. RSVP via Instagram.', '2023-03-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-9', 'Marshall Chess Club', 'marshall-chess-club', 'The heart of American chess since 1915.', 'Founded in 1915 by U.S. Chess Champion Frank J. Marshall, the Marshall Chess Club is one of the oldest and most prestigious chess clubs in the world.', 'New York, NY', 'US', 'club', NULL, NULL, '#1A3A5C', 'seed', 'Marshall Chess Club', 520, 110, 0, 1, 'https://www.marshallchessclub.org', NULL, NULL, '🏛️ The Marshall Chess Club Library is now open to members.', '1915-01-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-10', 'Saint Louis Chess Club', 'saint-louis-chess-club', 'World-class chess in the heart of America.', 'The Saint Louis Chess Club is widely regarded as the premier chess club in the United States.', 'Saint Louis, MO', 'US', 'professional', NULL, NULL, '#C41E3A', 'seed', 'Saint Louis Chess Club', 890, 47, 0, 1, 'https://saintlouischessclub.org', NULL, NULL, '🏆 2025 U.S. National Championships — registrations open now.', '2008-08-01 10:00:00'),
('seed-club-11', 'Charlotte Chess Center', 'charlotte-chess-center', 'The nation''s award-winning chess hub.', 'The Charlotte Chess Center (CCC) is a US award-winning chess club serving the Charlotte, NC community.', 'Charlotte, NC', 'US', 'professional', NULL, NULL, '#0066CC', 'seed', 'Charlotte Chess Center', 640, 52, 0, 1, 'https://www.charlottechesscenter.org', NULL, NULL, '📅 Sunday Action Quads — every Sunday afternoon.', '2014-06-01 10:00:00')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = VALUES(name),
  tagline = VALUES(tagline),
  member_count = VALUES(member_count),
  is_public = VALUES(is_public);
